title: truellum oreophilum
intro: Truellum oreophilum, also known as the mountain violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Montiaceae. The mountain violet has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and those seeking natural remedies.
